title: Manager (Business Development & Partnerships)
description:
Working location: Lau Pa Sat

6 day work week, Mon-Sat

  • Revenue Generation: To drive Lau Pa Sat growth by finding new business opportunities, building client bases, and forging strategic partnerships to increase our corporate event, roadshow & ads revenue. To achieve monthly/quarterly/annual revenue targets set by the company. 

  • Lead Generation: You are tasked to proactively identify new business leads and develop strategic plans to drive event sales & ads monetisation for Lau Pa Sat.

  • Account Management: To nurture high-value relationships with existing destinations/ travel agencies partners while onboarding new corporate clients through tailored event & roadshow proposals and pitches.

  • End-to-End Event Management: Conceptualize, plan, and oversee event logistics. Act as the primary point of contact for clients from pre-event briefing to post-event evaluation, ensuring all expectations are met and exceeded.

  • Events/ On-site Catering Management: Meeting with clients to understand their event and expectations, tailoring site configuration/ f&b menus to meet each client’s needs. To maintain health and safety standards related to sanitation and food service for the planned event.

  • Marketing & Collateral: Collaborate with the team to create compelling marketing plans and sales kits to promote Lau Pa Sat as a premier corporate event destination.

  • Stakeholder Coordination: Synchronize activities between tenants, vendors, and internal Operations Team. Oversee procurement for catering, AV, entertainment, and rentals to ensure seamless service delivery to the host.

  • Problem Solving: Act as the on-ground "troubleshooter" to resolve real-time issues, ensuring smooth event flow and high levels of customer satisfaction.

  • Continuous Improvement: Champion sales objectives and service standards, identifying opportunities to innovate our offerings in a fast-paced F&B and retail environment.

  • Ads Space Monetisation: Identify and package high-traffic zones within Lau Pa Sat and Food Folks (e.g., the courtyard, heritage corners, or Satay Street) for brand takeovers, pop-up activations, and product showcases.



Requirements & Skills

  • Experience: Minimum of 3-5 years of experience in Business Development, Event & Sales managerial role

  • Academic Background: Bachelor Degree in Business, Sales & Marketing from recognized University.

  • Technical Proficiency: Expert in Google Workspace/Microsoft Office. Experience in design software (Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, HTML, or Video Editing) is a significant advantage.

  • Sales Acumen: A natural hunter with the ability to identify monetization opportunities and close events & rental deals.

  • Communication: Exceptional interpersonal skills with professional fluency in written and spoken English (proficiency in Chinese is a plus for client relations).

  • Mindset: Meticulous, process-driven, and highly organized. You must be a self-starter who thrives in a high-pressure, dynamic environment.

  • Collaboration: A collaborative team player with the ability to work independently when required.

postedCompany.description:
NTUC Enterprise is the holding entity and single largest shareholder of the NTUC Social Enterprises. NTUC Enterprise aims to create a greater social force to do good by harnessing the capabilities of the social enterprises to meet pressing social needs in areas like health and eldercare, childcare, daily essentials, cooked food and financial services. Serving over two million customers, NTUC Enterprise wants to enable and empower all in Singapore to live better and more meaningful lives.

Kopitiam, a household name in the F&B sector is the latest addition to our family of NTUC Social Enterprises
postedCompany.name: KOPITIAM INVESTMENT PTE. LTD.
